    Methods in dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node that return Block
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected Block
    DefaultNodeBehavior.getConflictBlock(Block b)
    Builds a synthetic block containing the conflict-group counterparts of each transaction in b, based on the node's conflict registry.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected Block
    DefaultNodeBehavior.getConflictBlock(Block b)
    Builds a synthetic block containing the conflict-group counterparts of each transaction in b, based on the node's conflict registry.
    protected void
    DefaultNodeBehavior.handleNewBlockReception(Block b)
    Integrates a newly received block into the node's blockchain and updates the transaction pool accordingly.
    protected void
    HonestNodeBehaviorLimited.handleNewBlockReception(Block b)

    Classes in dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure that implement interfaces with type arguments of type Block
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BlockHeightComparator
    Comparator for Block objects that orders them based on their block height, with ties broken by block ID.
    Methods in dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure that return Block
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Block
    Blockchain.getBlockByID(int id)
    Finds a Block in the blockchain by its ID.
    Block
    Blockchain.getLongestTip()
    Returns the tip with the longest height.
    Block
    Blockchain.getNonOverlappingTip(Block b)
    Given a Block b find the tallest tip whose chain to the genesis does not contain transactions whose ID matches one of the IDs in the transactions in b.
    Methods in dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure with parameters of type Block
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Blockchain.addToStructure(Block b)
    Crudely request the addition of a validated block to the blockchain.
    int
    BlockHeightComparator.compare(Block b1, Block b2)
    Compares two Block objects.
    boolean
    Blockchain.contains(Block block)
    Checks if a Block is contained in the chain that begins from the parent of the block and reaches the genesis.
    Block
    Blockchain.getNonOverlappingTip(Block b)
    Given a Block b find the tallest tip whose chain to the genesis does not contain transactions whose ID matches one of the IDs in the transactions in b.
    Integer
    Blockchain.getTransactionDepth(Block tip, long txID)
    Returns the depth under tip in which transaction exists, or null if the transaction does not exist.
    boolean
    Blockchain.hasChainOverlap(Block b, Block tip)
    Checks whether a block overlaps with the transactions in the chain from a given tip to genesis.
